language: class myQueue: def __init__(self, n): # Define Data Structures self.arr = [-1]*n self.size = n self.front = 0 self.rear = -1 self.count = 0 def isEmpty(self): return self.count == 0 def isFull(self): # Check if queue is full return self.count == self.size def enqueue(self, x): # Enqueue if self.isFull(): return self.rear = (self.rear+1) % self.size self.arr[self.rear] = x self.count += 1 def dequeue(self): # Dequeue if self.isEmpty(): return -1 val = self.arr[self.front] self.front = (self.front+1) % self.size self.count -= 1 return val def getFront(self): # Get front element if self.isEmpty(): return -1 return self.arr[self.front] def getRear(self): # Get rear element if self.isEmpty(): return -1 return self.arr[self.rear]
